channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Massive dump of bags, baby cot etc, 27th May
item.description:
Big tip of rubbish This is the second tip I've reported along this stretch of road this week - it is my walk to work. It's a particularly bad road for tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eaglesfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: [Portable loo] left on pavement blocking the way, 27th May
item.description:
[Portable loo] left on pavement blocking the way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing pothole, 27th May
item.description:
The road surface has failed at the edge of a previous patch and the hole is growing whenever it rains.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forestdale, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street tree requiring overdue maintenance – repeated template responses without proper inspection, 27th May
item.description:
I am resubmitting this issue because the tree beside my property has still not been properly inspected or maintained, despite multiple reports over several years (most recently Ref: 9368861, submitted on 28 April 2026. Each time I report this, I receive the same standard response stating that “no remedial works are required,” but none of the specific concerns have been addressed, and it is unclear whether a full inspection has taken place. The tree is now: Approximately 3 feet from the side of the house, is taller than the property and has not been pruned for several years, despite previously being maintained roughly every two years I am attaching current photos showing the proximity to the building and the extent of overgrowth. Given the repeated identical responses and lack of action, I am requesting that this case be properly reviewed under the council’s duty of care and good arboricultural practice. The tree’s proximity to the property and the length of time since its last maintenance warrant a proper assessment. Thank you for your time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hammelton Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - piles of various items, 27th May
item.description:
Fly tipping been there since 26th May. Piles of various items including boxes, appliances, bags, and overflowing items. Outside wall along Lime Court residences

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkview Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street camera and bollard went missing - cars going through, 27th May
item.description:
This has been removed and reinstated a number of times. Please can you look into seriously penalising the cars going through and use street cameras to police seeing who repeatedly removed the bollards in the first place. Perhaps a permanent impossible to remove solution is better here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmington Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Sofa, impending footpath, 27th May
item.description:
The neighbour has dumped sofa again.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abersham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Carlton Parade, 27th May
item.description:
There is continuous rubbish along Carlton Parade and near the bus stop going towards St Mary Cray even though there are bins it doesn’t seem that they are used and people just drop their takeaway rubbish etc on the pavement, road and kerbside.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th May
item.description:
A non resident arrived in a van and dumped something that looked electrical, plus put flooring in the bins and another bag of what looked like decorating waste in the bin. This person is not a resident and should not be filling our bins and dumping waste beside them. The attached photos were taken at around 12.50pm today, 27th May, from my window

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hope Park, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Railing missing fallen in river, 27th May
item.description:
No railing to left side of the bridge so just a drop, very dangerous for kids

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): FP124, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of litter, 27th May
item.description:
Whilst walking my dog this morning I was alot of dumped rubbish all around the fields and along the river in hall place. People can't be bothered to take their rubbish with them. Please can this be sorted as my dog was trying to eat the plastic left. There's loads of plastic drink bottles and even someone's old towel. It's disgusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): FP124, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At 06.09 on 27 May 2026 fly tipping, 27th May
item.description:
The box of oven trays etc was dumped by this man outside Halstow school at 06.09 on 26 May 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kemsing Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree branch outside 117 East End Road, 27th May
item.description:
Large overgrown tree, large vehicles are hitting the branches and causing damage to double decker buses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, East End Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree vandalised, 27th May
item.description:
Young tree has been pushed over and requires replanting This is to the left of the pond via the entrance by Kent Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress Left on road, 27th May
item.description:
This mattress and bedframe appeared around a month ago and has clearly been fly tipped. It’s been rained on, and abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felltram Mews, Charlton

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114,116,118, East End Road, Finchley, Greater London

item.title: Dead animal on Glasbrook Road, 27th May
item.description:
Found a dead animal, we had to put it in our black bin as it was developing a bad smell
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glasbrook Road, Eltham

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously, 27th May
item.description:
Reporting overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously and Blocked off the pavement. Outside Cafe Concerto on Haymarket.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35,35a, Haymarket, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not permitted parking and rubbish, 27th May
item.description:
I am submitting a new complaint because the situation at Shere House still has not been resolved despite previous reports. A truck has been improperly parked in the Shere House car park for several weeks, and rubbish bags have also been abandoned in the area. This is causing serious inconvenience to residents, especially those who own cars and rely on the parking spaces daily. The lack of action to manage and resolve this issue is becoming increasingly frustrating for residents. I kindly request urgent intervention to remove the vehicle and the rubbish, and to ensure the parking area is properly managed and kept accessible for residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trinity Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
